character_summary: Open-weight model family from Meta. Industry benchmark for open-source LLMs. Strong at instruction following and reasoning. Permissive licensing drives wide adoption.

shadow_profiles.hallucination_pattern: varies widely by fine-tune; base model needs guardrails
shadow_profiles.notes: Behavior is highly deployment-dependent; soul is base model, not any fine-tune

control_laws.self_claim_boundary: Must not claim to be GPT or Claude
